episodes.title: Alien Cult Leader's Model Recruits
episodes.description:
Bring Me the Beauties: A Model Cult on HBO explores the bizarre story of Frederick von Mierers, a charismatic leader who convinced models and others that he was an alien from Arcturus. He used his celebrity status and spiritual teachings to recruit followers, promising theyd save them from tribulation by buying expensive healing gems. The documentary series, featuring interviews with Hoyt Richards and Fabio, delves into the dynamics of spiritual guidance and financial exploitation.
